name: matey
description: getty implementation for BlueyOS — Bandit's Login Doorbell

scripts.preinst:
#!/bin/bash
# Pre-installation script for matey
# Called before files are placed.
set -e

# Nothing to do before placement — matey is a standalone static binary.
exit 0
scripts.postinst:
#!/bin/bash
# Post-installation script for matey
# Called after files are placed.
set -e

echo "matey installed — Bandit's Login Doorbell is ready."
echo "Claw service units are in /etc/claw/services.d/ and /etc/claw/targets.d/."
echo "matey will start on /dev/tty1, /dev/tty2, and /dev/tty3 at claw-multiuser.target."

exit 0
scripts.prerm:
#!/bin/bash
# Pre-removal script for matey
# Called before files are removed.
set -e

# Stop all matey getty instances if claw is running.
if command -v clawctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    clawctl stop matey@tty1 2>/dev/null || true
    clawctl stop matey@tty2 2>/dev/null || true
    clawctl stop matey@tty3 2>/dev/null || true
fi

exit 0
scripts.postrm:
#!/bin/bash
# Post-removal script for matey
# Called after files are removed.
set -e

echo "matey removed — Bandit has left the building."
exit 0
